rootCause: Scope labels like '1.2' in 杨秀芳(1.2) were not split into individual class tokens [1,2] — the dot separator was not handled
fix: extractParenthesizedTeacherClasses now expands dot-separated numeric pairs (e.g. '1.2' → ['1','2']) before token processing
mappingRule: Token → classText lookup: try token+班, try other suffixes, exact match, then mark unmatched
classTokenUnmatchedRule: Only set when classText is blank OR token genuinely cannot map to any class in classText parts
